scopePolicy.included: Every public semantic comparison, cross-model certificate, diagnostic, algebraic image comparison, schedule comparison, and resource comparison discovered from the public root, audit, documentation, traceability, and paper. Comparison-bearing modules are conservatively inventoried with their supporting public declarations.
scopePolicy.excluded: Primitive scalar component identities, routine nonnegativity/accessor simp lemmas, and local support bookkeeping with no semantic comparison claim. Source-only rows deliberately have empty declaration arrays.
scopePolicy.immutability: Goal 2 declarations never enter this cohort; they belong only to Goal2SemanticAPIManifest.json.

classification.subject: state columns and one evolution
classification.inputScope: one explicit normalized two-coordinate input pair
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing diagnostic; classify as a failed convention, never physical ray equality

classification.subject: quaternionic state columns
classification.inputScope: arbitrary compatible columns; normalized wrappers where probabilities are claimed
classification.observationScope: ray, basis weight, total weight, evolution
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing state-ray API; relation-valued wrappers and normalized quotient remain future work

classification.subject: complex state columns
classification.inputScope: arbitrary compatible columns; normalized wrappers
classification.observationScope: ray, basis weight, total weight, evolution
classification.phase: complex right, equal to left by commutativity
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing state-ray API; quotient and hierarchy classification unimplemented

classification.subject: normalized state and finite distribution
classification.inputScope: one normalized state or two distributions
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing distribution construction/extensionality; classify independently of state-ray equality

classification.subject: finite distributions
classification.inputScope: one pair of pointwise-equal distributions
classification.observationScope: finite events and deterministic finite postprocessing
classification.ancillaPolicy: deterministic map supplies classical marginal/decoder

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing finite consequence family; not channel or randomized-machine equality

classification.subject: matrix action on state
classification.inputScope: every compatible state under a supplied unitary
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing forward preservation family; does not include converse norm-preserver classification

classification.observationScope: amplitudes, reconstruction, norm and inner product
classification.ancillaPolicy: one explicit top sector; no marginal

classification.ancillaPolicy: canonical or arbitrary real top-sector combination

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing cross-space state intertwining

classification.inputScope: every source pure state and every normalized pure top rebit
classification.ancillaPolicy: sum false/true added-wire sectors; pure uncorrelated top

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing pure-input decoded observation family; mixed top excluded

classification.inputScope: every source pure column; two canonical encodings
classification.observationScope: reduced matrix and its computational diagonal
classification.ancillaPolicy: explicit two-sector diagonal-block sum, not generic partial trace

classification.ancillaPolicy: no schedule selection; same finite occurrence family

classification.subject: image circuit and supplied compiled target
classification.inputScope: every source circuit under supplied compiler data
classification.ancillaPolicy: same target wires; no extra compiler ancilla in present interface

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing conditional wrapper family; no synthesis or approximation

families.evidence: gate count, width, arity, depth, dense-slot, and schedule-count theorems; `Architecture.md:283-315`

classification.subject: finite circuit/resource certificates
classification.inputScope: every circuit under each theorem's nonempty/common-wire/bound premise
classification.ancillaPolicy: shared-wire policy explicit; no observable decoder

families.provisionalDisposition: Existing nonbehavioral resource family; JSON must split heterogeneous declaration arrays

families.evidence: three `*exactSimulation` families and `ExactGateCompiler.eval_compileCircuit`; absence recorded in `Corrections.md:508-529`

classification.subject: exact versus encoded approximate circuit models
classification.inputScope: exact mathematical matrices only
classification.observationScope: no implemented error metric or approximate observation bound
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Boundary row: no Goal 1 approximation relation exists

classification.subject: normalized real state rays
classification.inputScope: every normalized real state representative
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Source family partially represented by concrete `Rebit`; relation/quotient unimplemented

families.evidence: Paper `fernandez-2003.md:40-48,119-128,395-407,812`; basis-preparation declarations are only one consumer

classification.subject: certified computational-basis action
classification.inputScope: every basis input for a certified basis-classical operator
classification.observationScope: induced classical basis permutation, deliberately forgetting general quantum action
classification.phase: input-column phase may be forgotten only under certificate
classification.ancillaPolicy: top-labelled target basis for the embedding examples

families.provisionalDisposition: Source anchor for nonvacuous `SameBasisBehavior`; generic biconditional forbidden

classification.subject: linear maps and unitary/orthogonal classes
classification.inputScope: every finite linear map under scalar/linearity hypotheses
classification.ancillaPolicy: none

families.provisionalDisposition: Background converse family absent or partial; antiunitary and scalar assumptions must remain explicit

classification.subject: mixed product top state and encoded bottom system
classification.inputScope: every uncorrelated mixed top rebit/qubit and source density/pure state as formalized
classification.ancillaPolicy: product/uncorrelated top; added wire marginalized; entangled top excluded

families.provisionalDisposition: Source mixed-state extension; Goal 1 proves only pure-top cases

classification.subject: two complex reduced density matrices from quaternionic encodings
classification.inputScope: every source quaternionic pure state
classification.observationScope: reduced matrices may differ while computational diagonals agree
classification.exactness: exact equality/inequality boundary unimplemented as density API
classification.ancillaPolicy: trace added top qubit

families.provisionalDisposition: Source separation family; current library proves direct weights only

classification.subject: encoded circuit/QTM/algorithm families
classification.inputScope: every encoded input and uniformly generated family
classification.phase: phase irrelevant unless approximation quotient chosen
classification.exactness: exact or approximate as source theorem specifies; no implementation
classification.ancillaPolicy: model-specific input/output ancillas and postprocessing must be costed

families.provisionalDisposition: Source computational-power family; finite per-circuit simulation is insufficient

classification.subject: noncontiguous semantic gate versus emitted contiguous/swap circuit
classification.inputScope: every finite support under a declared architecture
classification.observationScope: exact operator/circuit behavior plus routing resource cost
classification.exactness: exact semantic equivalence requested; construction absent
classification.ancillaPolicy: physical swap gates and any routing ancillas must be emitted/countable

families.provisionalDisposition: Source routing comparison; Goal 1 provides semantic reindexing only

classification.subject: encoded invariant sectors and added top wire
classification.inputScope: arbitrary source states; pure versus maximally mixed top distinguished
classification.observationScope: structural phase/orbit evolution, not merely final basis probabilities
classification.exactness: heuristic claim; exact replacement not yet selected
classification.ancillaPolicy: one added top wire; mixed-top phase-kickback exception

families.provisionalDisposition: Source interpretive family requiring invariant-subspace/orbit formulation

classification.subject: target circuit/model versus smaller source model
classification.inputScope: all target circuits only after a simulation relation and allowed encoders are fixed
classification.observationScope: ray, basis measurement, channel, or computational behavior must be chosen explicitly
classification.exactness: source inference unsupported; only algebraic nonimage is implemented
classification.ancillaPolicy: allowed ancillas/decoders unspecified in source

families.provisionalDisposition: Source operational converse family; matrix non-surjectivity alone is insufficient
